title: Birth of the Mighty Atom
overview: An experiment with A106 doesn't quite go as expected which leaves Hiroshi late for his part-time job and Umataro tending to his wounds.

title: Bewusstsein
overview: Hiroshi and Umataro present at Nerima University for their work on A106. Meanwhile, Ran has some trouble head her way.

title: Pursuing the Respective Leads
overview: An odd inspector stops by looking for a robotic dog, and the whole gang ends up trying to help him find it.

title: Welcome to Nerima U Festival
overview: Hiroshi and Umataro are struggling to bring in customers with their udon during the school festival. Meanwhile, Ran and Motoko are attacked.

title: Step on it! Maruhige Shipping
overview: Umataro, Hiroshi, and Six help Motoko move into her new place, but on the way to make the delivery, something goes amiss with the robots in town.

title: Lab 7's Annihilation
overview: Horoshi and Umataro get in a fight, and both are unwilling to apologize. Motoko tries to reunite the guys by reminding them why they became partners.

title: Ran and Princess Teru
overview: Ran and her teammates are busy preparing for a robot competition when Hiroshi makes a surprise visit to her club. How does Ran's robot do?

title: Robot Wrestling
overview: The robot wrestling tournament is underway, and Six has his hands full with his first challenge. Is he able to overcome it?

title: Six is Unfit to Fight
overview: The robot wrestling tournament continues as Six advances into the semi-finals, yet he doesn't seem to be ready for the next round. What could be wrong?

title: Battle Royal
overview: The ultimate robot battle is here! The faceoff between Dr. Lolo and Umataro is on. Who will come out the victor?

title: A Dialogue
overview: The final showdown between Mars and Six begins. Which robot will come out on top?

title: Beginning
overview: Umataro and Hiroshi try to figure out a way to fix Six, which begs the question: was the Bewusstsein project successful?
